headline: After a 50% Drop, Is ServiceNow Stock Worth Buying?
summary: Less than a year ago, ServiceNow stock (NYSE: NOW) was a market darling trading at over $211 a share. Today, it’s hovering around $102. That’s a massive 50% haircut from its peak, even though the actual business hasn’t missed a beat—growing revenues at 20% year after year.

headline: Datadog Backs Dust To Link Observability With Multiplayer AI Workloads
summary: Datadog (NasdaqGS:DDOG) joined Dust's US$40 million Series B funding round as an investor. The funding is aimed at expanding Dust's multiplayer AI platform for human and agent collaboration. Dust reports usage across thousands of organizations that deploy collaborative AI agents. Datadog is best known for its observability platform, which helps companies monitor cloud applications and infrastructure. Its participation in Dust's Series B links that core monitoring role with a growing area of...
